plugin.name: Morning & Evening Routine
plugin.description: Gentle daily check-ins to start and close your day with your pet.
config.morningTime.label: Morning time
config.morningTime.description: Local time for the morning greeting.
config.eveningTime.label: Evening time
config.eveningTime.description: Local time for the evening sign-off.
config.enableMorning.label: Enable morning
config.enableMorning.description: Show the morning greeting each day.
config.enableEvening.label: Enable evening
config.enableEvening.description: Show the evening sign-off each day.
command.morningNow.title: Morning greeting now
command.eveningNow.title: Evening sign-off now
command.pauseToday.title: Pause today
speech.morning: Good morning. Take a soft first step into the day.
speech.evening: Evening check-in. You can set today down now and rest.
speech.paused: Paused for today. I’ll check in again tomorrow.
